manifest.name: KnowStruct

name: KnowStruct

releases.author: Jackyun6
releases.description:
KnowStruct 0.5.1 addresses Obsidian review feedback.

- Adds declarative settings support for Obsidian 1.13 while retaining legacy compatibility
- Uses the current Node built-in module API and removes the obsolete dependency
- Removes CSS important overrides
- Expands the English README and privacy documentation

Requires Obsidian 1.7.2 or later.
releases.name: KnowStruct 0.5.1

releases.author: Jackyun6
releases.description:
## KnowStruct 0.5.0

Initial community release of KnowStruct for Obsidian.

### Highlights

- Knowledge projects with separate document, card, mind-map, and review workflows
- Editable Markdown content cards and Q&A cards
- Native Canvas mind maps with title-only collapsed nodes and full-content expanded nodes
- Spaced review for both card types
- Image and PDF conversion through MinerU cloud, Agent, and local API modes
- Migration from the legacy Cards, Imports, and Maps directory layout

### Installation

Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below, or install KnowStruct from Obsidian Community Plugins after approval.
releases.name: KnowStruct 0.5.0
